svg.text: cicgov — GCP Target Architecture (us-east1 primary | australia-southeast1 DR)
External Callers / Upstream Systems (same API contract — endpoint URL changes)
A records → GCP Load Balancer IP
GCP Cloud Endpoints / API GW + Cloud Armor
Cloud Endpoints ESP (extensible service proxy) | OpenAPI spec | JWT auth
Cloud Armor WAF: OWASP CRS managed ruleset | SQLi + XSS rules | Adaptive protection
Backend: GKE Ingress | HTTPS LB | Neg backends | Cloud Trace integration
GCP VPC — GKE Subnet / Private Subnet (us-east1 | australia-southeast1 secondary cluster)
Global / Regional | Forwarding rule | SSL termination
Backend: GKE NEG (Network Endpoint Group) | Health checks
GKE Standard / Autopilot — T2A ARM (Ampere Altra) | Workload Identity | VPC-native
GKE Ingress (NGINX or GCP Gateway API)
cicgov Deployment — Java / Spring Boot (minimal Helm changes)
Image: cicgov:{tag} | Port: 8080 | arch: arm64 (T2A) | Replicas: 1
CPU req: 0.1 / limit: 1 | Mem req: 1Gi / limit: 2Gi | readOnly rootFS
Config: Secret Manager (replaces SSM) | Config via GKE ConfigMap
SA: cicgov-ksa → Workload Identity → GCP Service Account
IDP client secrets synced from Secret Manager
Egress: allow internet, restrict ingress peer
VPC Firewall: allow LB → node-port, deny all else
Cloud Run / Cloud Functions v2 (replaces Lambda — Private VPC connector)
Same container image as AWS Lambda
Topics replace SNS | Subscriptions replace SQS queues | Filter attributes replace SQS filter policies
First 10 GiB/month FREE | Then $0.04/GiB | IAM-based auth (no open policies)
Dead-letter topics | Retention up to 7 days | Ordering optional | Exactly-once delivery optional
Cross-project messaging: IAM binding (roles/pubsub.publisher) on each topic
Message attributes replace SQS MessageGroupId | Filter attrs replace SQS FilterPolicy
Ack deadline: matches SQS visibility_timeout | Retain acked messages: optional
Message ordering: enabled for credential and legal-hold subscriptions
NOTE: First 10 GiB/month free. At ~2M msgs × 1KB avg = 2 GB → likely $0/month
GCP Firestore in Native Mode (replaces DynamoDB)
Serverless | Auto-scaling | PITR (built-in daily export) | Customer-managed encryption (Cloud KMS)
Collection: file-plan-records | Document schema maps PK/SK → document path + fields | Composite index = DynamoDB GSI
Cloud KMS + Service Account IAM (replaces KMS + IRSA)
Cloud KMS: 3 key rings (messaging, data, dns) | CMEK for Firestore, Pub/Sub, GCS
GCP Secret Manager + Identity Platform (replaces SSM + HxP IdP)
Identity Platform: OIDC federated with HxP IdP | Secret version rotation auto-notification
Terraform: google/google-beta providers | Spacelift multi-cloud support
Stacks: cicgov-networking, cicgov-gke, cicgov-pubsub, cicgov-data (same Spacelift structure)
Significant advantage: GCP's free Cloud Logging + Pub/Sub free tier reduce run-rate by ~$27/month vs AWS
GKE Autopilot option: pay per-pod (no idle node cost) — further reduces compute cost
